title: Projects
text:
Time-Series-Forecasting-with-R
A quantitative time series course repository in R focused on forecasting, stochastic structure, and time-aware validation, built with reproducible workflows on real economic and financial data.

Forecasting U.S. Imports of Mexican Automobiles
